mapper.select: SELECT id, name, slug, description, created_at, updated_at FROM blog_tag WHERE name = #{name} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, name, slug, description, created_at, updated_at FROM blog_tag WHERE name IN
#{n}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blog_tag (name, slug, description) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, #{description})
mapper.select:
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.description, t.created_at, t.updated_at, COUNT(bpt.post_id) AS post_count FROM blog_tag t LEFT JOIN blog_post_tag bpt ON t.id = bpt.tag_id
AND t.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
GROUP BY t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.description, t.created_at, t.updated_at ORDER BY t.id DESC
